title.description: The site name displayed as the main heading.

subtitle.description: A short subtitle below the site title, introducing the navigation cards.
subtitle.notes: Should convey 'here are our applications/projects'. Keep short.

nav.games.description: Navigation card label for the Games subsite.
nav.games.notes: This is a brand name — do not translate.

nav.games.desc.description: Short description shown under the Games card.
nav.games.desc.notes: Describe playing web-based games. Keep it short and engaging.

nav.bookshelfai.description: Navigation card label for the BookshelfAI subsite.
nav.bookshelfai.notes: This is a brand name — do not translate.

nav.bookshelfai.desc.description: Short description shown under the BookshelfAI card.
nav.bookshelfai.desc.notes: Describe AI-powered book discovery. Keep it concise.

nav.rulersai.description: Navigation card label for the RulersAI subsite.
nav.rulersai.notes: This is a brand name — do not translate.

nav.rulersai.desc.description: Short description shown under the RulersAI card.
nav.rulersai.desc.notes: Describe historical political data and analysis. Keep it concise.
